name: feat
description: New feature implementations and structural enhancements

name: fix
description: Targeted bug fixes and code corrections

name: refactor
description: Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature

name: perf
description: Code changes that explicitly improve execution performance

name: test
description: Adding missing tests or correcting existing test suites

name: ci
description: Changes to continuous integration configurations, scripts, and automation workflows

name: build
description: Changes affecting the build system, workspace layouts, or external dependencies

name: chore
description: Repository maintenance, toolchain shifts, and meta-configuration updates

name: maintenance
description: Scheduled maintenance obligations, dependency reviews, and toolchain upkeep

name: breaking
description: Introduces a breaking change; requires migration notes and semver major bump

name: good first issue
description: Well-scoped issue suitable for first-time contributors

name: help wanted
description: Maintainer is requesting outside input or contributions

name: duplicate
description: Tracks a problem already reported in another issue
